description: Test regular ingest-message sent from CEGA to LEGA.
The message is correctly validated against the 'ingestion-trigger.json' schema.
The user name should be replaced, and the message should end up in the 'files' queue in LEGA.
Test regular accession-message sent from CEGA to LEGA.
The message is correctly validated against the 'ingestion-accession.json' schema.
The user name should be replaced, and the message should end up in the 'files' queue in LEGA.

testname: test validation of message without type field
description: Test ingestion-accession-request message sent from LEGA to CEGA.
The test simulates a message read from the 'verified' queue in LEGA and reposted to CEGA with the routing key 'files.verified'.
The message does not have a 'type' field, so it will be attempted validated against all known JSON schemas.
It should (at least) match the 'ingestion-accession-request.json' schema.
The user name should be replaced, and the message should end up in the 'v1.files.verified' queue in CEGA.
Test accession message with unknown user sent from LEGA to CEGA.
Since the database does not contain a mapping for this user, a regular (non-validation) error will be returned.
The message should not be forwarded, but an error message should be posted to CEGA instead.
reason: Fails since John is not a registered user in the database

description: Test accession message with no user sent from CEGA to LEGA.
The message is validated against the 'ingestion-accession.json' schema, but validation fails
because the message does not contain the required 'user' field. Since this is a validation error,
the message should not be forwarded to the regular 'files' queue, but instead be reposted to LEGA
with the unknown routing key 'validation_error' which is handled by the alternate exchange.
reason: Validation fails because the accession-message is missing the required 'user' field

testname: test validation of wrong checksum format
description: Test ingest-message sent from CEGA to LEGA with format error in a checksum.
The message is validated against the 'ingest' JSON schema, but validation fails because
the SHA256 checksum does not have the expected format of 64 hexadecimal digits.
The message should not be forwarded to the regular 'files' queue, but instead be reposted to LEGA
with the unknown routing key 'validation_error' which is handled by the alternate exchange.
reason: Validation fails because the SHA256 hash does not have the correct length

description: The test simulates the unlikely scenario of an HTML message being sent from CEGA to LEGA.
Since the message cannot be parsed as JSON at all, a validation error will be returned.
The message should not be forwarded to the regular 'files' queue, but instead be reposted to LEGA
with the unknown routing key 'validation_error' which is handled by the alternate exchange.
reason: Validation fails since the message is not properly JSON formatted and cannot be parsed
message:
This is an HTML page

That could be problematic

testname: test validation of typed message against missing schema
description: Test mapping-message from CEGA to LEGA with missing schema.
The message has type 'mapping' and should thus be validated against the schema 'dataset-mapping.json',
but this schema has intentionally been excluded from the test suite for the purpose of this exact test.
Failing validation, the message should not be forwarded to the regular 'files' queue, but instead be reposted
to LEGA with the unknown routing key 'validation_error' which is handled by the alternate exchange.
reason: Validation fails since the 'dataset-mapping.json' schema is not found

testname: test untyped JSON message that fails validation against all schemas
description: Test improperly formatted message sent from LEGA to CEGA.
The test simulates a message read from the 'verified' queue in LEGA, which is to be reposted to CEGA with routing key 'files.verified'
The message does not have a 'type' field, so it will be attempted validated against all known JSON schemas,
but since the SHA256 checksum does not have the correct format (64 hex-digits), validation fails against all schemas.
The message should not be posted to CEGA, but instead be reposted to LEGA with the unknown routing key 'validation_error'
which is handled by the alternate exchange.
reason: The message does not validate against any known JSON schemas

testname: test wrong content type in the message header
description: Test error handling when the ContentType in the message header is not set to 'application/json' (or missing).
This should trigger a validation error.
reason: The message has an incorrect ContentType in its header
message: This is just a regular text
